name: Missed medication
purpose: Help users organize missed-dose worries for pharmacist or clinician guidance — not catch-up dosing advice.
not_allowed: Telling user to double dose or skip future doses
Diagnosing harm from a missed dose

red_flags.label: severe symptoms after missed or extra dose

required_questions.prompt: When was the dose due and when did you remember?
Did you take extra to catch up?

allowed_actions.title: Write medication log
allowed_actions.instruction: Note medicine name, scheduled time, and what happened for pharmacist or clinician.

allowed_actions.title: Ask pharmacist
allowed_actions.instruction: Contact pharmacist or clinician about missed dose — do not double on your own.
